data.title: TERRA NOVA
data.description:
A multi-platform environmental campaign for the Scandinavian Conservation Alliance. The brief was stark: make people feel the urgency of biodiversity loss without resorting to guilt or despair. We chose awe.

The campaign centres on large-format photography of Nordic ecosystems, printed at architectural scale and installed in urban environments — a 40-metre forest canopy unfurling across the facade of Oslo Central Station, tidal pools projected onto the floor of a Copenhagen shopping centre.

The visual language pairs raw, untouched nature photography with razor-sharp typography and data visualisations. The campaign reached 12 million impressions in its first week and drove a 340% increase in donation sign-ups.

images.alt: Dense forest canopy shot from below
Campaign installation at Oslo Central Station
